project.name: PlayCove
project.description: Mobile-first community app for parents to create groups and share kid playdates. Built with Next.js (App Router) + Supabase (Auth, DB, Storage, RLS).

stack.design: Warm yellow + earth tones, mobile-first, card grid

env.notes: Create .env.local with your Supabase URL and anon key.

tables: users (auth.users source of truth for profile metadata)
group_members (group_id, user_id, role: owner|admin|member, status: active|pending|rejected)
events (group_id, owner_id, title, description, date_iso, start_time, end_time, location_name, city, map_url, age_min, age_max, capacity, tags text[], visibility: public|group, contact, is_hidden)
helpers: public.is_admin(uid uuid) RETURNS boolean SECURITY DEFINER
rls_summary: admins: single flat SELECT policy to authenticated; no writes via client
events: owners or public.is_admin(auth.uid()) can update/delete; group/member read via policies
group_members: policies to allow owners/admins approval; members read

design.notes: Login look/feel carried across app. Bottom nav active state, no gradients, earth tones. Mobile-first.

routes.role: Home - Upcoming playtimes scoped to my groups

components: BottomNav (Home, Groups, Discover, My Posts, Profile) with active highlight
EventCard (owner sees Edit, hides Report; members see RSVP/Report; non-members limited contact)

done: Profile with avatar (public bucket), display name, location, bio, logout
Group create/manage; Discover hides my owned groups
Events create/edit; owner vs member actions
next: v5.0: design polish pass across routes; consistent header; spacing & card density for ≤375px

notes: If you see duplicate headers on any route, ensure local files do NOT import Header directly; root layout renders it.
On owner cards: show Edit, hide Report. Non-owner: RSVP + Report.
Discover page: filter out groups where owner_id == auth.uid().
